## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:integration` passes (if data access changed)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] API routes touched are auth-guarded, RBAC-checked, and org-scoped
- [ ] No secrets in code, logs, or API responses
- [ ] UI works in both light and dark themes
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if user-facing)

## Notes for reviewers

Anything to call out (security, migrations, follow-ups).
